needle_load.note: Claude has 5s idle before needle_load; combined idle+needle_load 12s vs GPT-4o 8s (delta 4s).

suture_placement.note: Relatively tight agreement on placement duration.

third_throw.note: GPT-4o absorbs late-task regrasping into throw 3 (same pattern as V11/V12/V14).

suture_cut.note: Claude assigns 55s to cut (longest in V-series), GPT-4o only 30s. Sum of third_throw + suture_cut: Claude 78s vs GPT-4o 74s — tight agreement on the combined late-task window (delta 4s).

gap_visible.note: Drain-gap divergence returns. V16 is 640x480 — the lowest resolution in the V-series — and Claude flags a small gap (partial_small_gap, low confidence). GPT-4o sees complete closure.

placement_alignment.note: Both teachers low/very_low confidence — 640x480 resolution makes exact mm measurement unreliable.

fls_score_reconciliation.reconciliation_note: Moderate agreement — largest ΔFLS in the V-series so far (14 points). 9s time delta and 5pt penalty delta both contribute. The penalty delta breaks down as: 1pt placement (both teachers low confidence) + 4pt Claude gap penalty that GPT-4o doesn't see. The time delta is harder to attribute — Claude stops the clock 9s later, possibly because it waits for a cleaner 'both tails cut' frame. Reconciled midpoint 424.0 is reasonable; the GPT-4o point estimate (431) is likely closer to a human proctor given its higher confidence (0.66 vs 0.40).

systematic_findings.boundary_disagreement_persists: Same third_throw/suture_cut mirror as V11/V12/V14 — sum of the two phases is within 4s, individual durations disagree by 20+ seconds. Training signal guidance stands: use total_time + penalties, not raw per-phase durations.
systematic_findings.resolution_dependent_gap_bias: V16 confirms the resolution-dependent Claude gap bias. Pattern now: low-res monitor recordings (V11, V14, V16) → Claude flags gap, GPT-4o does not. Higher-res direct or good-monitor recordings (V12) → both teachers agree no gap. V16 is the lowest-resolution V-series entry (640x480) and also shows the largest penalty delta. Recommend a recording-quality → gap-bias confidence weighting before using Claude's drain signal for training.
